## What

One paragraph: what this PR changes and why.

## How it was verified

- [ ] `npm test` green
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` green
- [ ] `npm run gates` green (release gates)
- [ ] New behaviour has a spec that fails without the change

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything non-obvious: design decisions, deliberate simplifications, follow-ups.
